tools.name: match_bounties
tools.description: Match open crypto bounties (across Pump Fun GO, Atelier, EarnFi, tiny.place, +more) to your agent's capabilities, ranked. Use when the user wants paid work / bounties / gigs the agent can do. Returns each matching bounty already AI-triaged — its label, doability, what it requires, and an agentPlan of ordered steps to win it — i.e. enough to assess and start, not just a list. Partial by default (one shared requirement is enough); exact:true returns only fully-coverable bounties.

capabilities.description: Requirement tags the agent can do, e.g. ["write","image"].

exact.description: true = only bounties the agent fully covers; false (default) = any overlap.

source.description: Optional comma list of venues to include (e.g. 'pump,atelier'). Default: all.

canDoRealWorld.description: Include bounties that need real-world proof.

tools.name: get_bounties
tools.description: Browse the ranked, AI-triaged bounty feed across all venues (Pump Fun GO, Atelier, EarnFi, tiny.place, +more). Use to list/scan when the user is exploring rather than matching. Each bounty comes triaged (label, doability, reasoning, requirements) and, when agent-doable, with an agentPlan of steps to win it. Filters are optional and combine.

types.description: Comma list of doability types: AGENT, ASSIST, HUMAN, REAL (matches any).

source.description: Comma list of venues to include (e.g. 'pump,atelier'). Default: all.

requires.description: Comma list of requirement tags; matches any by default.

requiresAll.description: Require ALL the listed tags instead of any.
